mapper.update: UPDATE monitor_alert_rule SET name = #{name}, event_type = #{eventType}, threshold_count = #{thresholdCount}, window_minutes = #{windowMinutes}, enabled = #{enabled} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, name, event_type, threshold_count, window_minutes, enabled, create_time, update_time FROM monitor_alert_rule WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, project_id, name, event_type, threshold_count, window_minutes, enabled, create_time, update_time FROM monitor_alert_rule WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY id ASC
